# Greenstone Peptides

> USA-compounded peptide therapy. Third-party tested under USP 797 sterile standards.

## About
Greenstone Peptides provides premium peptide formulations compounded in the USA by licensed pharmacy partners with 25+ years of pharmaceutical care. All products are third-party tested for potency, sterility, and endotoxin.

## Products
- Semaglutide (injectable and ODT) — GLP-1 weight management
- Tirzepatide (injectable and ODT) — dual GIP/GLP-1 weight management
- Retatrutide (injectable) — triple agonist weight management
- BPC-157 (injectable) — recovery and repair
- TB-500 (injectable) — recovery and tissue repair
- NAD+ (injectable and nasal spray) — anti-aging and cellular energy
- GHK-Cu (injectable) — anti-aging copper peptide
- MOTS-c (injectable) — metabolic optimization
- Sermorelin (injectable) — growth hormone support
- Tesamorelin (injectable) — growth hormone support
